// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: HashTableCompact
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{


    [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Auto)]
    private struct E
    {
        internal ulong Key;
        internal E(ulong key)
        {
            Key = key;
    }
    };

    private static readonly byte[] _bucketStarts = new byte[] {
        0, 1, 2, 3
    };

    private static readonly byte[] _bucketCounts = new byte[] {
        1, 1, 1, 1
    };

    private static readonly E[] _entries = {
        new E(ulong.MinValue), new E(1ul), new E(2ul), new E(ulong.MaxValue)
    };

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    private static ulong Hash(ulong value)
    {
        return (ulong)value;
    }

    
    public static bool Contains(ulong key)
    {


        ulong hash = Hash(key);
        int index = (int)(hash % 4);
        int start = (int)_bucketStarts[index];
        int count = (int)_bucketCounts[index];
        int end = start + count;

        for (int i = start; i < end; i++)
        {
            ref E entry = ref _entries[i];

            if (entry.Key == key)
                return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 4;
    public const ulong MinKey = ulong.MinValue;
    public const ulong MaxKey = ulong.MaxValue;
}
